info.name: EC2 job.server (Contact360)
info.description:
HTTP collection for [`EC2/job.server`](../../../EC2/job.server) (Gin, Mongo, Asynq). Parity with gateway [`JobServerClient`](../../../contact360.io/api/app/clients/job_server_client.py) and [`ROUTE-CLIENT-MATRIX`](../endpoints/job.server/ROUTE-CLIENT-MATRIX.md).

## Auth
- **`/api/v1/*`**: header **`X-API-Key`** must match server **`API_KEY`** when non-empty. If `API_KEY` is empty, v1 routes do not require a key.
- **`GET /health`**: no API key.

## Base URL
`{{base_url}}` (default `http://localhost:9900`).

## Response shapes (reference)
| Case | HTTP | JSON |
|------|------|------|
| List jobs | 200 | `{ "success": true, "data": [LinkedInJob…], "total": number, "limit": number, "offset": number }` |
| Job by id | 200 | `{ "success": true, "data": LinkedInJob }` |
| Job missing | 404 | `{ "detail": "job not found" }` |
| Jobs stats | 200 | `{ "success": true, "total_jobs": number, "jobs_with_company": number }` |
| Runs list / run by id | 200 | `{ "success": true, "data": … }` |
| Run missing | 404 | `{ "detail": "run not found" }` |
| POST run (enqueue) | **202** | `{ "success": true, "message": "scrape enqueued", "task_id": string, "queue": string }` |
| POST bad body | 400 | `{ "detail": "…" }` |
| Companies list / company jobs | 200 | `{ "success": true, "data": … }` |
| Connectra OK (job company) | 200 | `{ "success": true, "data": { "job": …, "company": … } }` |
| Connectra OK (contacts) | 200 | `{ "success": true, "data": { "contacts": [], "total": number, "job_poster_contact": … } }` (poster only on **job** contacts route) |
| Connectra OK (company record) | 200 | `{ "success": true, "data": company }` |
| Connectra not configured | **503** | `{ "success": false, "detail": "Connectra is not configured…" }` |
| Job has no `company_uuid` | **409** | `{ "success": false, "detail": "job has no company_uuid…" }` |
| Connectra / handler errors | **502** / **500** | `{ "detail": "…" }` |
| Company record: empty uuid | **400** | `{ "detail": "company_uuid is required" }` |
| Health OK | 200 | `{ "status": "ok", "mongo": "ok", "redis": "ok", "details": {} }` |
| Health degraded | **503** | `{ "status": "degraded", "mongo": "…", "redis": "…", "details": {} }` |

**Connectra read-through** routes need `CONNECTRA_BASE_URL` + `CONNECTRA_API_KEY`. Contacts use query caps: `page` default 1 **max 10**, `limit` default 25 **max 100**.

item.name: Health
item.description: Root router. **`GET /health`** — Mongo + Redis ping. **`status`**: `ok` or `degraded`; HTTP **503** when degraded.

request.description: No query or body. **200** all backends up; **503** if Mongo or Redis ping fails (body still lists `mongo` / `redis` fields).

item.name: Jobs
item.description: Mongo **`linkedin_jobs`**. **`GET /api/v1/jobs`** — filters are optional; **`seniority`** / **`function`** are case-insensitive regex on `seniority_level` / `function_category_v2`. **`posted_after`** / **`posted_before`** accept **`YYYY-MM-DD`** or **RFC3339** (see repo `parsePostedAtLowerBound` / `UpperBound`).

request.description:
**Query (all optional unless noted):** `limit` (default 25), `offset` (default 0), `title`, `company`, `location`, `employment_type`, `seniority`, `function`, `posted_after`, `posted_before`.

**200** envelope: `success`, `data` (array), `total`, `limit`, `offset`. **500** `{ "detail": "…" }` on DB error.

query.description: ISO date YYYY-MM-DD or RFC3339; posted_at >= bound (UTC start of day for date-only)
ISO date or RFC3339; posted_at <= bound (end of day for date-only)

request.description: **Path:** `:id` = LinkedIn job id (`linkedin_job_id` in Mongo). **200**: `{ success, data: LinkedInJob }`. **404**: `{ "detail": "job not found" }`.

item.name: Runs
item.description: Mongo **`apify_runs`**. **`POST /api/v1/runs`** enqueues Asynq task `start_scrape` — response is **202 Accepted**, not 200. Body matches Go **`tasks.StartScrapePayload`** (`internal/tasks/payloads.go`). Empty body is accepted; `trigger` defaults to **`api`**.

request.description: **Path:** `:id` = Apify run id. **200**: `{ success, data }`. **404**: `{ "detail": "run not found" }`.

**JSON body** (`StartScrapePayload`):
- `trigger` (optional): e.g. `cron`, `manual`, `api` — default **`api`** if omitted.
- `urls` (optional): string array of LinkedIn search URLs.
- `count` (optional): int.
- `scrapeCompany` (optional): bool.
- `splitByLocation` (optional): bool.

**202**: `success`, `message`, `task_id`, `queue`. **400** invalid marshal (rare). **500** enqueue failure.

item.name: Companies
item.description: Distinct companies and jobs-by-company from Mongo (not Connectra). **`GET /api/v1/companies/:company_uuid/jobs`** — `company_uuid` is the stored UUID on job rows.

item.name: Connectra (sync via job.server)
item.description:
Handlers: `job_connectra_handlers.go`, `company_connectra_handlers.go`. Proxies **sync.server** when `CONNECTRA_BASE_URL` + `CONNECTRA_API_KEY` set.

**Shared query (contacts):** `page` (default 1, **max 10**), `limit` (default 25, **max 100**), `populate_company` (default true; accepts true/false).

**Job contacts only:** `include_poster` (default true).

**Status quick ref:** **503** Connectra unset; **409** job missing `company_uuid`; **404** job or Connectra company not found; **502** upstream/transport; **400** empty `company_uuid` on company routes.

request.description: VQL contact search for the job's `company_uuid`. **200** `data`: `contacts`, `job_poster_contact` (nullable), `total`.

query.description: Fetch job poster contact when UUID present

response.name: 409 Conflict (no company_uuid)

request.description: Connectra `GET /companies/{uuid}` for the job's `company_uuid`. **200** `data`: `{ "job": …, "company": … }`. **409** if no `company_uuid` on job.

response.name: 503 Connectra not configured

request.description: VQL contacts for Connectra company UUID. **200** `data`: `contacts`, `total`. No `include_poster` (job-only).
Single Connectra company record. **200** `data` is the company object. **400** if path uuid empty.
